mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, user_name, content, visibility_level, confirm, create_date FROM prevention_comment WHERE visibility_level = #{visibilityLevel} ORDER BY create_date ASC
SELECT id, user_id, user_name, content, visibility_level, confirm, create_date FROM prevention_comment WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prevention_comment WHERE visibility_level = #{visibilityLevel}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prevention_comment (user_id, user_name, content, visibility_level, confirm, create_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{content}, #{visibilityLevel}, #{confirm}, NOW())
